mapper.sql: CD.CODE_DETAIL_SEQ AS codeDetailSeq, CD.CODE_GROUP_SEQ AS codeGroupSeq, CD.PARENT_DETAIL_SEQ AS parentDetailSeq, CD.CODE_ID AS codeId, CD.CODE_NAME AS codeName, CD.CODE_VALUE AS codeValue, CD.DESCRIPTION AS description, CD.CODE_LEVEL AS codeLevel, CD.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, CD.USE_YN AS useYn, CD.ATTR1 AS attr1, CD.ATTR2 AS attr2, CD.ATTR3 AS attr3, CD.CREATE_ID AS createId, CD.CREATE_IP AS createIp, DATE_FORMAT(CD.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, CD.MODIFY_ID AS modifyId, CD.MODIFY_IP AS modifyIp, CD.STATUS AS status, DATE_FORMAT(CD.MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CODE_DETAIL CD
ORDER BY
CD.CODE_ID CD.CODE_NAME CD.CODE_LEVEL CD.SORT_ORDER CD.CREATE_DT CD.CODE_DETAIL_SEQ
ASC DESC
LIMIT #{safeSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM CODE_DETAIL CD WHERE CD.CODE_DETAIL_SEQ = #{codeDetailSeq} AND CD.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CODE_DETAIL ( CODE_GROUP_SEQ, PARENT_DETAIL_SEQ, CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, CODE_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CODE_LEVEL, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, ATTR1, ATTR2, ATTR3, STATUS, CREATE_DT, CREATE_ID, CREATE_IP, MODIFY_DT, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_IP ) VALUES ( #{codeGroupSeq}, #{parentDetailSeq}, #{codeId}, #{codeName}, #{codeValue}, #{description}, #{codeLevel}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{attr1}, #{attr2}, #{attr3}, #{status}, NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE CODE_DETAIL SET CODE_ID = #{codeId}, CODE_NAME = #{codeName}, CODE_VALUE = #{codeValue}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, CODE_LEVEL = #{codeLevel}, PARENT_DETAIL_SEQ = #{parentDetailSeq}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, ATTR1 = #{attr1}, ATTR2 = #{attr2}, ATTR3 = #{attr3}, STATUS = #{status}, MODIFY_DT = NOW(), MODIFY_ID = #{modifyId}, MODIFY_IP = #{modifyIp} WHERE CODE_DETAIL_SEQ = #{codeDetailSeq}
UPDATE CODE_DETAIL SET USE_YN = 'N', MODIFY_DT = NOW(), MODIFY_ID = #{modifyId}, MODIFY_IP = #{modifyIp} WHERE CODE_DETAIL_SEQ = #{codeDetailSeq} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
